channel.title: The Record — Veritas Worldwide
channel.description: A Documentary History of Power, Money, and the Institutions That Shaped the Modern World. Primary Sources. Public Record. Your Conclusions.

item.title: A Note on Methodology, Evidence Standards & How to Read This Book
item.description: This is a reference work. It compiles primary source documents — court records, congressional testimony, declassified government files, academic studies, and verified financial disclosures — into a single chronological narrative.

item.title: The World Today
item.description: How a convergence of financial, political, pharmaceutical, and intelligence systems created the architecture of modern control — and why most people never notice.

item.title: The Birth of Central Banking
item.description: From the Frankfurt ghetto to the Bank of England, from Napoleon's wars to the halls of the United States Congress, the story of how private banking dynasties captured the power to create money, and what happened to those who tried to take it back.

item.title: The Bank War & The Presidents Who Fought Back
item.description: Four American presidents took on the banking establishment. Three were assassinated. One survived an assassination attempt that should have killed him.

item.title: Jekyll Island & the Creation of the Federal Reserve
item.description: In November 1910, six men representing a quarter of the world's wealth boarded a private rail car in New Jersey. Their destination: a private island off the coast of Georgia. Their mission: to draft the blueprint for a new central bank.

item.title: The Warburg Brothers & World War I
item.description: Two brothers from one of Europe's most powerful banking families found themselves on opposite sides of the Great War — one advising the Kaiser, the other shaping American financial policy.

item.title: Henry Ford, The International Jew & the Gold Standard
item.description: The industrialist who built the American middle class also published the most controversial newspaper series in American history — and his warnings about the gold standard proved prophetic.

item.title: The Talmud, the Balfour Declaration & the Origins of Zionism
item.description: The documented history of the political movement that would reshape the Middle East and redefine the relationship between religion, nationalism, and geopolitics.

item.title: Mossad: The Institute
item.description: The intelligence agency that operates by its own rules — from covert assassinations to nuclear espionage, documented through declassified files and sworn testimony.

item.title: JFK, Dimona & AIPAC
item.description: President Kennedy's documented confrontation with Israel's secret nuclear program and the lobby that would reshape American foreign policy.

item.title: JFK — Expanded Analysis
item.description: A comprehensive examination of the evidence surrounding the assassination of President John F. Kennedy, including declassified documents released through 2025.

item.title: The Petrodollar System
item.description: How a secret agreement between Henry Kissinger and the Saudi royal family created the foundation of American economic hegemony — and why it is now unraveling.

item.title: Shadow Institutions — Bilderberg, CFR, Trilateral Commission & the BIS
item.description: The private organizations where the world's most powerful people meet behind closed doors — documented through leaked attendee lists, founding charters, and their own publications.

item.title: How the Federal Reserve Works
item.description: A plain-English explainer on the institution that controls the American money supply, who owns it, and how it operates — stripped of jargon and presented with primary source documentation.

item.title: The 2008 Financial Crisis
item.description: How Wall Street's reckless gambling crashed the global economy, how the government bailed out the banks with taxpayer money, and how no one went to prison.

item.title: AIPAC & Congressional Lobbying
item.description: The most powerful foreign policy lobby in America — how it operates, who it funds, and what happens to those who oppose it.

item.title: U.S. Foreign Aid to Israel
item.description: A comprehensive accounting of American taxpayer money sent to Israel — totaling over $300 billion in inflation-adjusted terms — and the legal framework that enables it.

item.title: The USS Liberty Incident
item.description: On June 8, 1967, Israeli forces attacked an American intelligence ship in international waters, killing 34 U.S. servicemen. The official investigation was classified for decades.

item.title: The Assassination of Robert F. Kennedy
item.description: The evidence surrounding the murder of a presidential candidate who promised to reopen his brother's assassination investigation.

item.title: Operation Mockingbird & CIA Media Influence
item.description: The documented CIA program to infiltrate and influence American media — from the Cold War to the present day.

item.title: MKUltra & Government Mind Control Programs
item.description: The CIA's documented program of human experimentation — using drugs, torture, and psychological manipulation on unwitting American citizens.

item.title: Rockefeller Medicine & the Chronic Disease Machine
item.description: How the Rockefeller Foundation reshaped American medicine to favor pharmaceutical treatment over prevention — and the financial incentives that keep the system in place.

item.title: Vaccine History — From Polio to COVID-19
item.description: A documented history of vaccine development, the regulatory framework that governs it, and the financial incentives that shape public health policy.

item.title: September 11, 2001
item.description: The event that changed the world — examined through the official record, the 9/11 Commission Report, and the questions that remain unanswered.

item.title: The War on Drugs
item.description: How a policy designed to criminalize dissent became the longest and most expensive domestic war in American history.

item.title: Fluoride & Public Water
item.description: The documented history of water fluoridation — from its industrial origins to its adoption as public health policy.

item.title: The Titanic, the Federal Reserve & the Men Who Opposed It
item.description: Three of the wealthiest men who opposed the creation of the Federal Reserve boarded the same ship in April 1912. None of them survived.

item.title: Bohemian Grove & Elite Gatherings
item.description: Inside the private retreat where American presidents, defense contractors, and media moguls gather each summer in the redwoods of Northern California.

item.title: The Surveillance State — From ECHELON to Pegasus
item.description: The documented history of government mass surveillance — from Cold War signals intelligence to the smartphone in your pocket.

item.title: The Epstein Files
item.description: The intelligence-linked operation that compromised the world's most powerful people — documented through court filings, flight logs, and the testimony of survivors.

item.title: A Note on Continued Research & Primary Source Access
item.description: Where to find the original documents, how to verify the claims in this book, and how to continue the investigation.
